title: Position show
description: This mods allows you to see your location and your fps at the top left corner without opening the f3 screen that lower your fps.
body:
This mods lets you see your fps and coordinates without opening hte f3 debig screen, because the f3 debug screen takes lowers your fps.

# BETTER VERSION OUT: 
### [Extra Show](https://modrinth.com/mod/extra-position-show)
This new version adds a ton of new features ranging from preset to custom name.

## Keybinds
> r - toggle the fps display\
> p - toggle the coordinate display
